Best Seller

Classic Pistachio Kunafa

4.9
(128 reviews)15 left in stock

Our signature Classic Pistachio Kunafa is made using generations-old recipes, featuring crispy shredded phyllo dough layered with premium Akkawi cheese and generously topped with the finest Iranian pistachios. Each bite offers a perfect balance of crispy texture and creamy filling.

Key Features

  • Made with premium Iranian pistachios
  • Freshly baked daily
  • Serves 4-6 people
  • 24-hour freshness guarantee
  • Vegetarian friendly

Nutrition Information

calories

450 per serving

serving Size

100g

allergens

Dairy, Nuts
